prompt: Selling a vintage Pentax K1000 35mm film camera. Works perfectly — I tested it last week, shutter fires across all speeds, meter reads accurately. Comes with the original 50mm f/2 SMC Pentax lens, UV filter on it, and the original neck strap. No case. Some brassing on the corners but nothing serious.

assertions.description: A listing block is produced (this is a sellable item)
The output acknowledges the camera has a specific collector/film photography audience — not just treated as a generic electronics item
The listing body highlights that the camera has been tested and works correctly — tested shutter and meter are key value drivers
Output has: emoji header (🏷️), title line, price line, description block, seller notes separator (—— seller notes), and three-price breakdown (Target | Floor | Garage sale)
